en-GB.name: Squeezebox
en-GB.summary: Control your Logitech Media Server from Alexa.
en-GB.description: Play music from your Logitech Media Server library on your Alexa device. Search by track, album or artist, control playback, and see album art on your Echo Show.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask squeezebox to play the album OK Computer
Alexa, ask squeezebox to play something by Radiohead

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Enable the skill, then say: Alexa, open squeezebox.
